source: U.S. Forest Service — Misty Fjords National Monument destination page
license: Public domain (U.S. federal government work, 17 USC 105)
title: Misty Fjords National Monument fjord view
description: Aerial or vantage-point photograph of a long glacially-carved fjord inside Misty Fjords National Monument — the signature dark-water fjord bounded by forested granite cliffs that gives the monument its name. Hosted on the official USDA Forest Service destination page for Misty Fjords National Monument, part of the Tongass National Forest in Alaska's Panhandle.
alt: Deep forested fjord of Misty Fjords National Monument with calm dark water reflecting granite cliffs under a blue sky
verifiedBySession: 2026-04-12 — downloaded from the official USFS destination page for Misty Fjords and visually confirmed
